response.global_analysis: The video concludes with the members of Secret Society holoX making final announcements about their new Music Video 'Gyouan Xdeath' and their album 'SecretORDER'. The spoken audio matches the visual context of a post-live talk. From 01:49 onwards, an intro sequence for the MV begins, but the audio becomes a distorted digital loop shortly after 'Let's go!'. I have transcribed and translated all clear spoken dialogue and the intro cues, discarding the remaining song lyrics from the reference JSON as they are not discernibly present in the corrupted audio loop.

subtitles.original: 22時10分よりですね、MVをプレミア公開したいと思います！
subtitles.english: At 22:10, we'll be premiering the music video!

subtitles.original: やったー！ / おおー！ / エクスデスだ！
subtitles.english: Yay! / Ooh! / It's Xdeath!

subtitles.original: おしゃれですね。かっこいい。
subtitles.english: It's so stylish. And cool.

subtitles.original: そして本日24時、12月2日の0時にデジタルリリースが開始されますので...
subtitles.english: Also, the digital release starts today at 24:00—that's 0:00 on December 2nd...

subtitles.original: ライブに向けてたくさん聴いてくれよな！
subtitles.english: So please listen to it a lot in preparation for the live!

subtitles.original: いや、もうコールできるところいっぱいだからね！
subtitles.english: Yeah, there are so many parts where you can join in the calls!

subtitles.original: めちゃくちゃもう、ライブのための曲だから！
subtitles.english: It's totally a song made for live performances!

subtitles.original: エクスデス！エクスデス！
subtitles.english: Xdeath! Xdeath!

subtitles.original: お前ら新曲いっぱい聴いて、予習して、ライブ楽しみに待っててほしい！
subtitles.english: I want you guys to listen to the new song a lot, study up, and look forward to the live!

subtitles.original: そしてアルバム『SecretORDER』を持って...
subtitles.english: And take the 'SecretORDER' album...

subtitles.original: 持って？ / 持って！ / 忘れないように気をつけてね！
subtitles.english: Take it? / Take it! / Make sure you don't forget it!

subtitles.original: ライブ来てね！ / 運ばなきゃ！
subtitles.english: Come to the live! / We have to carry it!

subtitles.original: 聴いて予習してね！ / はい！
subtitles.english: Listen and study up! / Yes!

subtitles.original: アルバムは22時から販売開始です！もう1分ないで！
subtitles.english: The album goes on sale at 22:00! There's less than a minute left!

subtitles.original: 早い！みんな買ってね！
subtitles.english: So fast! Everyone, please buy it!

subtitles.original: ホロックスのみんな、本当に4年間ありがとな！
subtitles.english: Everyone in holoX, thank you so much for these four years!

subtitles.original: ありがとう！
subtitles.english: Thank you!

subtitles.original: 来年はもうホロックスの、我々の年にしていくので！
subtitles.english: Next year, we're going to make it holoX's year!

subtitles.original: そうだね！ / 頑張ろうね！
subtitles.english: That's right! / Let's do our best!

subtitles.original: 5年目もよろしくお願いします！
subtitles.english: Please support us in our fifth year too!

subtitles.original: じゃあみんな、せーので行くよ！せーの、バイバーイ！
subtitles.english: Alright everyone, on three! One, two... Bye-bye!

subtitles.original: 改革！改革！改革！改革！
subtitles.english: Revolution! Revolution! Revolution! Revolution!

subtitles.original: Ladies and gentlemen, introducing...
subtitles.english: Ladies and gentlemen, introducing...

subtitles.original: Six... five... four... three... two... one...
subtitles.english: Six... five... four... three... two... one...

subtitles.original: Let's go!
subtitles.english: Let's go!
